name: document_creation
description: Proficiency in creating formatted Word documents with text content and embedded images
instructions_md: To create a Word document: 1) Determine the output path and filename — expand ~ for home directory. 2) Call create_word_doc with output_path, title (heading), body_text, and optionally image_path. 3) If you need to embed an image, ensure image_path exists before calling create_word_doc. 4) For plain text output without Word formatting, use file_write with a .txt extension instead. 5) Always confirm the returned output_path exists after creation.
